narrative:
Cols 72-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 829 registered voters, with 49.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.4%, a modest Republican lean of 3.5 percentage points.
